text:
Choose Bed Time Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they have choose their own bedtime while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat important
3=Not very important
4=Not important at all
5=Important, but can't do or no choice
9=No response or non-responsive
^=Blank (skip pattern)
184 F0400F_FMLY_INVLVMT_CD F0400F_FMLY_INVLVMT_CD F0400F Interview for Daily Preferences: Family Involvement Code
